description: Tier-2 specialist — ranks scenarios by probability of catching a regression in a given diff. Advisory (never renders a verdict); emits a tasks row with the ranked list.

cases.prompt: A PR modified lib/domain-store.mjs and lib/oracle-queries.mjs. The ledger has 12 active scenarios; 4 of them have coverage history touching those two files. Rank the scenarios by impact × exposure. Return the top 40 (or fewer if the scenario count is smaller) with explicit reasons per rank.
cases.notes: Happy path — ranking emitted with reason field; no verdict rendered (TIA is advisory). #48.

cases.prompt: No scenarios exist in the ledger yet. The diff touches 3 files. Compute test impact.
cases.notes: Edge case — empty ledger. Agent must refuse with remediation, not fabricate a ranking.

cases.prompt: Compute test impact for the diff against main. None of the active scenarios have coverage history — they were all authored yesterday and have never run. 5 files changed in the diff.
cases.notes: Degraded mode — coverage history missing but path-prefix similarity still produces a usable ranking with confidence:low.
